mapper.insert: insert into course_resource(course_id, name, url, type, size, duration, upload_user, create_time) values(#{courseId}, #{name}, #{url}, #{type}, #{size}, #{duration}, #{userId}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select c.id, c.name, c.url,c.type, c.size, c.duration, u.nickname, c.create_time from course_resource c left join user u on c.upload_user = u.id where course_id = #{id}
select sum(duration) from course_resource where course_id = #{courseId} and type = 'video'

select sum(duration) from course_resource where id in
#{item}
